title: Review: recent jmap-chat feature additions (maxChanges, RateLimited, utils, blob_convert, chat fields)
notes:
Maintainer risk: LOW — The RateLimited/blob_convert/channel/destroy additions are well-scoped. Main risks are the UTC display footgun and format string stability which are documentation gaps, not logic bugs.
Confidence: 90% chance of no missed logic bug. Uncertainty driven by: spec conformance for Blob/convert (exact field names not verified against draft). Would raise confidence if: ran against a live JMAP server or compared against a reference BLOBEXT implementation.
